# format: html5-dom-v2
# status: active

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="a" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="class" value="one"}]
        "one"
        <!-- gap -->
      element ns=html local="a" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="class" value="two"}]
        "two"
